title: d2c IR Run Manifest
description: Mechanical bookkeeping file written by the d2c-build skill at the start of Phase 2 (IR emit). Anchors a run to a specific tokens file version and Figma URL. Not model-authored.

schema_version.description: IR artifact schema version. 1 = unscored matching, 2 = scored component matching. MUST match schema_version in all other IR artifacts (component-match, token-map, layout).

figma_url.description: The Figma URL the run was initiated for.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (with timezone) of when the run started.

framework.description: Framework resolved from design-tokens.json at run start.

tokens_file_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the tokens file(s) at run start. If split_files is false, hash of design-tokens.json. If split_files is true, hash of core|colors|components|conventions split files concatenated in that fixed order.
